# Amit Bhardwaj

> Certified Salesforce Architect & Developer · Copado DevOps Engineer · Systems Designer

## Manifesto

> Decoupled, event-driven architectures and automated DevOps release governance are key to building enterprise systems that scale.

Amit Bhardwaj is a London-based Certified Salesforce Technical Architect and Developer with over 14 years of experience leading programs and system design at companies like Genpact and HCL Technologies. He has successfully delivered over 100 Salesforce projects, bridging CRM systems with enterprise SAP ERP modules and implementing robust Copado CI/CD pipelines.

## Contact & Availability

- **Location:** London, United Kingdom (Remote / Hybrid)
- **LinkedIn:** https://www.linkedin.com/in/salesforce-technical-architect
- **Website:** https://amitbhardwaj.co.uk

---

## Case Studies & Articles

### n8n for PMs
- **Title:** n8n for PMs: Cheat Sheet + Free AI Templates
- **Focus:** Automating sprint reports and feedback classification with AI workflows using n8n.
- **Key Terms:** n8n for PMs, Sprint Reports, Feedback Classification.

### AI Agent Jacobo
- **Title:** AI Agent Jacobo: Multi-Agent AI with Tool Calling & Voice AI
- **Focus:** Omnichannel AI agent (WhatsApp + voice) built for retail mobile repairs.
- **Metrics:** Achieved a ~90% self-service rate.

### Programmatic SEO
- **Title:** Programmatic SEO: 4,000+ Pages from an ERP
- **Focus:** Rebuilding a legacy service site as a programmatic Astro site powered by Airtable and DataForSEO.

### Self-Healing Chatbot
- **Title:** The Self-Healing Chatbot: From Widget to Production LLMOps
- **Focus:** Dual text + voice chatbot system running Claude Sonnet.
- **Defense:** 6-layer defense system including canary token, prompt injection patterns, and fingerprint checks.
- **Evals:** 71 automated evals run on every PR via a CI gate, utilizing trace-to-eval telemetry.
- **Cost:** Costs average $0.005 per conversation with $0 infrastructure overhead.
- **Batch Eval:** Langfuse traces scored overnight with Sonnet for intent classification, quality, safety, and jailbreak defense. E-mail triggers run on failures using Resend.

---

## Projects & Experiments

### Employee Engagement Platform
- **Type:** SaaS Concept
- **Focus:** A platform designed to improve employee engagement using gamification, feedback loops, and AI-driven insights.

### AI Product Information Platform
- **Type:** AI & Data Enrichment
- **Focus:** A system designed to centralize product data and enhance it using AI-driven enrichment pipelines and translations. Built using Python, FastAPI, and OpenAI API.

### Home Lab Infrastructure
- **Type:** DevOps & Infrastructure Lab
- **Focus:** A fully self-hosted Proxmox virtualized environment used for exploring pfSense firewalls, OpenWRT networking, and Netdata monitoring dashboards.

### Enterprise Integration Architecture
- **Type:** Salesforce ↔ SAP Integration
- **Focus:** Event-driven architecture connecting Salesforce CRM with enterprise SAP ERP backends.

---

## Professional Experience

### Genpact (2024 - Present)
- **Role:** Senior Manager & Solutions Architect
- **Focus:** Leading Salesforce multi-cloud integrations and Copado/Azure release governance pipelines.

### HCL Technologies (2019 - 2024)
- **Role:** Salesforce CRM Program Architect
- **Focus:** Release engineering, branching models, environment strategies, and custom Apex/LWC development.

### Infomatrix (2013 - 2019)
- **Role:** Salesforce Practice Lead
- **Focus:** Custom Salesforce core designs, LWC/Apex engineering, and security audits.
